Bash("/c/Users/vetar/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Launcher/py.exe" - << 'PYEOF'
import sqlite3

db_path = r"C:\\Users\\vetar\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\inject.db"
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db_path\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)

c.execute\("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'"\)
print\("Tables:", c.fetchall\(\)\)

c.execute\("SELECT id, patientId, filePath, fileName, filterType FROM recordings"\)
rows = c.fetchall\(\)
print\(f"Recordings count: {len\(rows\)}"\)
for row in rows:
    print\("  Recording:", row\)

conn.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash("/c/Users/vetar/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Launcher/py.exe" - << 'PYEOF'
import sqlite3
db_path = r"C:\\Users\\vetar\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\inject.db"
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db_path\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)
c.execute\("SELECT * FROM room_master_table"\)
print\("room_master_table:", c.fetchall\(\)\)
conn.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash("/c/Users/vetar/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Launcher/py.exe" - << 'PYEOF'
import sqlite3, time

db_path = r"C:\\Users\\vetar\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\taal_clean.db"
conn = sqlite3.connect\(db_path\)
c = conn.cursor\(\)

c.execute\("SELECT * FROM room_master_table"\)
print\("room_master_table:", c.fetchall\(\)\)

c.execute\("SELECT id, patientId, filePath, fileName, filterType, createdAt FROM recordings"\)
rows = c.fetchall\(\)
print\(f"Recordings: {len\(rows\)}"\)
for row in rows:
    print\("  ", row\)

c.execute\("SELECT id, fullName, patientId FROM patients"\)
print\("Patients:", c.fetchall\(\)\)

conn.close\(\)
print\("DB looks good!"\)
PYEOF)

Write-Host ''Done''
")
